title: Optimally Schedule Maintenance Windows for Multiple Systems

statement.markdown: Given a list of system maintenance jobs, each represented by a time interval [start, end], and the same number of windows for maintaining these systems, each represented by a valid time interval [winStart, winEnd]. Determine the optimal schedule such that the number of maintenance windows used is maximized.
statement.inputFormat: A list of integers representing the start and end times of maintenance jobs, and another list of integers representing the start and end times of maintenance windows.
statement.outputFormat: The maximum number of maintenance windows that can be used.
statement.notes: If a maintenance window can be used for multiple maintenance jobs, choose the one with the longest end time.
